title: Groupe Solotech Inc. secured a minority investment from Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec
content:
## Groupe Solotech Inc. secured a minority investment from Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec
On November 26, 2023, Groupe Solotech Inc. (“Solotech”) secured a minority investment from Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec, which represents the largest investment in Solotech since 2013. This investment will enable Solotech to continue its acquisition and organic growth strategy to expand its presence in various markets and create more value for its customers.
Solotech is a world leader in audiovisual and entertainment technology with 20 strategic locations across Canada, the United States, Europe and Asia.
McCarthy Tétrault advised Groupe Solotech Inc. with a team led by Éric Gosselin and Vincent Laurin that included Karl Bherer, Thierry Côté, Annabelle Lecluse-Moka and Marie-Josée Nadeau (Business), Alexandre Buswell (Labour & Employment) and Véronique Wattiez-Larose (Intellectual Property).
